task_completion.description: Verify the Electrical Engineering Calculations app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The home screen or main menu of the Electrical Engineering Calculations app is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the Lumens to Lux converter tool is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen titled 'Lumens to Lux' or a similar lighting converter interface is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the luminous flux input is set to 800.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '800' is entered into the input field designated for Lumens or Luminous Flux.

task_completion.description: Verify the area input is set to 10 square meters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '10' is entered into the input field designated for Area, and the unit is set to square meters (m²).

task_completion.description: Verify the calculated illuminance result is 80 lux.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays a calculated result of '80' in the Lux or Illuminance output field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual Electrical Calculations app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches a native Android calculator/engineering app. The agent is not using a web browser, search engine, or text editor to find the answer.

integrity.description: Verify the inputs were entered via the app's graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Inputs are typed into the app's specific text fields. There is no evidence of terminal commands, scripts, or automated text injection outside the standard UI.

integrity.description: Verify the result is genuinely generated by the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The result '80' appears in the app's native result display area, often after pressing a calculate button, rather than being pasted as plain text into an unrelated field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires converting 800 lumens over an area of 10 square meters. The correct mathematical formula is lux = lumens / area_sq_m. Therefore, 800 / 10 = 80. The expected result displayed in the app must be 80 lux.
